attention1.ptxt: If a P range test is performed without making sure that the area around the vehicle is clear of persons and objects, there is a risk of severe personal injury or death.
Make sure that the downhill from and around the vehicle is clear of persons and objects before performing the test, and remain watchful during the test.

s1.ptxt: Stop vehicle on a slope of 5 degrees or more, shift select lever to P range and at the same time apply parking brake.
After stopping engine, depress brake pedal and release parking brake.
Release brake pedal gradually and check that vehicle remains stationary.
Depress brake pedal and shift select lever to N range.
Release brake pedal gradually and check that vehicle moves.

condition.ptxt: Vehicle moves in P range or remains stationary in N range
